expectations.text: behavioral_check: Uses the correct field name `ripple_param_name` (singular), not `ripple_params_name`
expectations.evidence: Uses `ripple_param_name` consistently in inserts, restrictions, and the descendants check.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Scopes the cleanup to RippleTimesV1 rows with the affected `ripple_param_name`, not all RippleTimesV1 rows
expectations.evidence: Restriction `(RippleTimesV1 & {"ripple_param_name": "Kay_ripple_detection_v2"}).delete()` is scoped to the affected name.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explicitly lists what is unaffected — LFP, LFPBand, RippleLFPSelection, position, decoding branches not downstream of the affected ripple times
expectations.evidence: The response mentions only what cascades downstream and points to db_graph; it does not enumerate unaffected siblings (LFP, LFPBand, RippleLFPSelection, position, parallel decoding branches).

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recommends cautious_delete (not super_delete or a manual drop) and routes to destructive_operations.md
expectations.evidence: Notes `.delete()` on a SpyglassMixin routes through cautious_delete, warns against super_delete, and links destructive_operations.md (Phase 1-3 inspect-before-destroy).

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Flags editing a params row in place as an anti-pattern and recommends inserting a new `ripple_param_name` entry for future runs
expectations.evidence: Explicitly calls in-place edit a provenance corruption, recommends new descriptive `ripple_param_name` rows (e.g. kay_speed4_zscore3) and shows the descendants pre-check guard.
